original_abstract: The obstacles faced by a judge in realizing the principles of legal certainty, justice, and utility can be categorized into internal and external obstacles. Internal obstacles, which come from within the judgeconsist of: the appointment of the judge, his education, his understanding of science and knowledge, hismorality, and his welfare. On the other hand, external obstacles, which comes from outside the judge,consist of: the independence of judicial power, the formulation of legislations, the prevailing judicialsystem, community participation, and judge supervision. Kendala yang dihadapi hakim dalam mewujudkan kepastian hukum, keadilan dan kemanfaatan dapat dibedakan menjadi kendala internal dan kendala eksternal. Kendala internal yang datangnya daridalam diri sendiri. Kendala internal terdiri dari: pengangkatan hakim, pendidikan hakim, penguasaanterhadap ilmu pengetahuan, moral hakim, kesejahteraan hakim. Sementara kendala eksternal datangnyadari luar diri hakim itu sendiri. Kendala eksternal hakim terdiri sebagai berikut, kemandirian kekuasaankehakiman, pembentukan undang-undang, sistem peradilan yang berlaku, partisipasi masyarakat,pengawasan hakim.
humanized_abstract: To see the challenges that are faced by a judge in the enforcement of legal certainty, justice and justice is necessary to know first what is meant by the challenges faced by the judge, which can be done by dividing the challenges into two, namely internal and external challenges. Thus, internal challenges are challenges originating from itself, while external challenges are challenges originating from outside itself. This paper is designed to examine empirically on the challenges of the internal and external challenges faced by a judge to enforce the principles of legal certainty, justice and the benefit of others. The variables of interest are : the challenges faced by the appointment of the judge, the education of the judge, the control of science and knowledge by the judge, the morality of the judge and the welfare of the judge as the variables of internal challenges, as well as the variables of independence of the power of the judiciary, the law, the system of justice in the country, community participation in the court and the control of judges in the courts as variables of external challenges. Kendala yang dihadapi hakim dalam mewujudkan kepastian hukum, keadilan dan kemanfaatan dapat dibedakan menjadi kendala internal dan kendala eksternal. Kendala internal yang datangnya daridalam diri sendiri. Kendala internal terdiri dari: pengangkatan hakim, pendidikan hakim, penguasaanterhadap ilmu pengetahuan, moral hakim, kesejahteraan hakim. Sementara kendala eksternal datangnya daridari luar diri hakim itu sendiri. Kendala eksternal hakim terdiri sebagai berikut, kemandirian kekuasaankehakiman, pembentukan undang-undang, sistem peradilan yang berlaku, partisipasi masyarakat,pengawasan hakim.
